titleStmt.title: SII 5.707: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 707. (A.R. No. 143 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhu vaṉaccakra vartti śrīrājarāja tevarkku yāṇṭu 2 Āvatu Uṭai- yār tiruviṭai marutuṭai yār koyil mutal pirakārattu melai tirumāḷikaiyil paṇimūppimāril rājarājīśvar(ā) ttup patiyilāril Ariyapirāṭṭi Utai yapperumāḷ periyatevar tirapuvaṉaviratevarkku yāṇṭu 3 10 7 Āvatu nāḷil Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Uṭai yār poruntiya taippūcamuṭaiyanāyaṉārkkup pūcai kku Uṭai yār
tiruviṭai marutuṭai yār tevatāṉattu tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa nilattu Iṟai mikuti pūcai k kuṭalāka Ittevar tirunāmattu taṇṭeśva rapperuvilaiyāka koṇṭa vaṇṇakkuṭiyāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻaccaruppetimaṅkalattu tirunāmattukkāṇiyil viṟṟa śrīviranārāyaṇavatikku kiḻakku maturāntakavākkālukku teṟkku 5- kū 1- catirattu kappaṭakkovai Eṉṟu peruṭai ya nila
m kuḻi 2 100 7 10 3 m Iṅke viḷākam Eṉṟu peruṭai ya nilam kuḻi 4 100 9 10 4 I Āka kuḻi 7 100 6 10 7 I-m tiraimūr tiraimūrakuḷum tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa nilattu viṟṟa tiraimurkkaḷa muṉṟāṅ kaṇṭattu kulottuṅkacoḻavatikku kiḻakku tirucciṟṟampalavākkālukku teṟkku kiḻacal veḷūrkiḻavar Ammai Appar Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattukku meṟkum teṉacal Āṟāṅ kaṇṇā
ṟṟu tūrttuk kiṭakkiṟa vāykkālukku vaṭakkum melacal poṉṉampalanam(p)pi nilattukkum paṉṟikkuḷattukkum kiḻakkum vaṭaacal tirucciṟṟampalavāykkālukku teṟkkum naṭuvuḷppaṭa nilam kuḻi 1000 5 100 8 10 2 m brahmade yam muṉṟāṅ kaṇṭattu kulottuṅkacoḻavatikku kiḻakku marutamāṇikkamayakkal Eṉṟu peruṭaiya nilattukku
teṉacal villavaṉ brahma mārāyar makaṉ nilattukku vaṭakkum melacal vatikku kiḻakkum vaṭaacal Āṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu tūrttu kiṭakkaṟa vāykkālukku teṟkkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam kkuḻi 5 100 m nālāṅ kaṇṭattu parameśva ravatikku meṟkku cāttaṉvāykkālukku teṟku maṇali Eṉṟu peruṭaiya nilattukku kiḻacal Aṉapāyavaṉ taṇanampiyum ga mutavaṉ cūriyatevaṉ pāriyai
Iḷaiya Umai yāṇṭāḷum nilattu meṟkkum teṉacal Ivvūr Ellaikku vaṭakkum melacal tiruviṭai marutu nakarattu Ellaikkum vaṭaacal tirupātirik kūpaṭṭa nampi nilattukku teṟkum vaṭakkum kiḻakkum Iṉṉamu vaṭapāṟ kellai cāttaṉ vāykkālukku teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam kuḻi 1000 100 3 10 m Āka tirai murum tiraimurakkaḷum nilam kuḻi 3 1000 2 100 10 2 m
Āka vaṇṇakuṭi Uḷpaṭa nilam kuḻi 3 1000 9 100 7 10 9 I nāl nilam � kakkum piramāṇa vilaippaṭi kācu Ernta 4 1000 4 100- m 2 Āvatu nāḷ 100 3 10 8 varaiyum cipaṇṭārattu Oṭukkivittukoṇṭu I nilam Oṉṟe mukkāle nālumā mukkāṉ ciṉṉamum In(t)tap poruntiya taippūcamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku tirunāmattukkāṇiyāy
Ūramar Īnta kaṭamai kuṭimai kku veṇṭupatu nikki Iṟai mikuti pūcai k kuṭalāka niccayittu viṟṟamai yil Ippaṭi kallil veṭṭivittuk kuṭukka Eṉṟu piḷḷai kāliṅkarāyar Olai vantaṭai valRead vantamaiyil.ippaṭiye Ittevaṟkku Iṉnilam tirunām(ā)ttukāṇiyāya Iṟai mikiti pūcaik kuṭalāka niccayittamaikku
Digital edition of SII 5.707 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
